description: Post a message to a Slack public or private channel. Use the channel id from the list channels tool.

channel_id.description: Slack channel ID (e.g. C12345 or G123 for private channels), not the human-readable name.

text.description: Plain-text message body for the channel (Slack mrkdwn formatting is supported by Slack when using chat.postMessage).  This should be in Slack mkdwn format, not necessarily CommonMark markdown

thread_ts.description: Optional parent message timestamp (`ts`) to post this message as a thread reply. Use the `ts` from slack_list_messages, the original mention message id, or a prior slack_post_message response.
